test_cases.name: test_health_check_returns_ok
test_cases.description: Verify that the health check endpoint returns status ok

test_cases.name: test_create_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Create an author with all required fields and verify the response

test_cases.name: test_create_author_without_name_returns_422
test_cases.description: Attempt to create an author without the required name field and expect validation error

test_cases.name: test_get_existing_author_returns_200
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by ID and verify the response contains the correct data

test_cases.name: test_get_nonexistent_author_returns_404
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve an author that does not exist and expect a 404 error

test_cases.name: test_update_author_name_successfully
test_cases.description: Update an author's name and verify the change is reflected in the response

test_cases.name: test_delete_author_without_books_returns_204
test_cases.description: Delete an author that has no associated books and expect a 204 status

test_cases.name: test_delete_author_with_books_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete an author that still has associated books and expect a conflict error

test_cases.name: test_create_category_with_valid_name
test_cases.description: Create a category with a valid name and verify the response

test_cases.name: test_create_duplicate_category_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a category with a name that already exists and expect a conflict error

test_cases.name: test_delete_category_with_books_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete a category that has associated books and expect a conflict error

test_cases.name: test_create_book_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Create a book with all required fields and verify the response contains the correct data

test_cases.name: test_create_book_with_negative_price_returns_422
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with a negative price and expect a validation error

test_cases.name: test_create_book_with_duplicate_isbn_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an ISBN that already exists and expect a conflict error

test_cases.name: test_get_existing_book_returns_200
test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing book by ID and verify the response

test_cases.name: test_get_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Attempt to retrieve a book that has been soft-deleted and expect a 410 Gone error

test_cases.name: test_soft_delete_book_returns_204
test_cases.description: Perform a soft delete on a book and verify the 204 status

test_cases.name: test_restore_soft_deleted_book_returns_200
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book and verify the response

test_cases.name: test_restore_non_deleted_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to restore a book that is not deleted and expect a 400 error

test_cases.name: test_apply_discount_to_old_book_returns_200
test_cases.description: Apply a valid discount to a book published more than a year ago and verify the discounted price

test_cases.name: test_apply_discount_to_new_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply a discount to a book published in the current year and expect a 400 error

test_cases.name: test_increase_stock_successfully
test_cases.description: Increase the stock of a book by a positive quantity and verify the new stock value

test_cases.name: test_decrease_stock_below_zero_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to decrease the stock of a book below zero and expect a 400 error

test_cases.name: test_upload_valid_cover_image_returns_200
test_cases.description: Upload a valid PNG image as a book cover and verify the response

test_cases.name: test_upload_unsupported_file_type_returns_415
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a file with an unsupported MIME type and expect a 415 error

test_cases.name: test_upload_file_too_large_returns_413
test_cases.description: Attempt to upload a file that exceeds the maximum size limit and expect a 413 error

test_cases.name: test_create_review_for_existing_book_returns_201
test_cases.description: Create a review for an existing book and verify the response

test_cases.name: test_create_review_for_soft_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a review for a soft-deleted book and expect a 410 Gone error

test_cases.name: test_create_tag_with_valid_name_returns_201
test_cases.description: Create a tag with a valid name and verify the response

test_cases.name: test_create_duplicate_tag_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to create a tag with a name that already exists and expect a conflict error
